title: [IOS]Analytics - Feedback Opened
scenario: Verify that opening the Feedback form on mobile increments event counts for related elements after a delay.
steps: Open the Feedback form (Mopinion) on the mobile app.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Navigate to the page displaying Feedback form analytics.
Verify the page displays default elements: a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
Check that the event count for related elements has increased.
expected: The page displays default elements including a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment. Opening the Feedback page on mobile increases the event count for related elements after some time.
